name: bitacora
description: Bitácora — tracker-aware (Jira · GitHub · GitLab) workflow layer for Claude Code. Every bit of context, logged.

plugins.name: bitacora
plugins.description: Clean session handoffs, session resume, and audience-tailored status summaries — including multi-ticket reads — anchored on the [CTX] comment-format discipline. Targets Jira (Atlassian Rovo MCP) or GitHub Issues (gh CLI), selected per-repo; Remember optional.
